Operation 'listProjects' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what project information is returned and the context for when this operation would be used. Enhanced version clarifies return structure and use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of projects within the used account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all projects associated with the authenticated account. Returns project metadata including project ID, name, and configuration details. Useful for discovering available projects before querying or managing content.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what project information is returned and the context for when this operation would be used. Enhanced version clarifies return structure and use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getQuery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is vague about what type of recommendations. Description lacks clarity on required inputs and complete output structure. Enhanced version specifies query ID requirement, return schema, status checking logic, and error conditions for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves content recommendations for a given query. After creating a new query with /new-query it usually takes around 60 seconds until recommendations are prepared. Check whether status=='ready' to see if recommendations are available.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SEO content recommendations for a previously created query. Requires the query ID as input. Returns QueryRecommendations object containing keyword analysis, content suggestions, and readiness status. Recommendations are typically available 60 seconds after query creation - check status=='ready' before consuming recommendations. Returns error if query not found or recommendations not yet prepared.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what type of recommendations. Description lacks clarity on required inputs and complete output structure. Enhanced version specifies query ID requirement, return schema, status checking logic, and error conditions for better AI agent decision-making.

Enhanced version clarifies the filtering mechanism, return structure, and use case for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves queries within a project matching your criteria and provides information about their status.
data.summary_suggestion: List queries with filtering and status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a filtered list of queries within a specified project. Accepts filtering criteria via ListQueriesRequest (project ID, status, date range, etc.). Returns array of QueryListItem objects containing query details, current status, and metadata. Useful for monitoring query progress and managing multiple content recommendations.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description vaguely references 'criteria' without explaining what filtering options are available. Enhanced version clarifies the filtering mechanism, return structure, and use case for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getContent' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks specificity about content type. Description doesn't clearly state required inputs or return structure. Enhanced version specifies query ID requirement, clarifies revision type filtering options, defines return schema, and explains use cases for AI agents.

data.current_description: Retrieves the last content revision saved for a given query. You can choose between manually saved revisions (default) or all (including autosave revisions).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the last saved content revision for a specified query. Requires query ID as input. Supports filtering by revision type: manually saved revisions (default) or all revisions including autosave. Returns ContentResponse object containing the revision content, timestamp, and revision metadata. Useful for retrieving previously edited content or tracking content history.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about content type. Description doesn't clearly state required inputs or return structure. Enhanced version specifies query ID requirement, clarifies revision type filtering options, defines return schema, and explains use cases for AI agents.

message: Operation 'importContent' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate. Description lacks clarity on required input parameters, return structure, and explicit mention of revision creation as a state-changing side effect. Enhanced version specifies input options, return information, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of operation consequences.

data.current_description: Allows you to update the editor content via API for a given query. You can either import HTML or send a URL that will be auto-imported and parsed. Creates a new content revision.
data.description_suggestion: Updates editor content for a specified query by importing HTML directly or from a URL. Accepts ImportContentRequest with query ID and either HTML content or URL. Automatically parses and validates imported content. Creates a new content revision (saved to revision history). Returns response confirming import success and new revision details. Side effect: modifies query's content state and creates permanent revision record.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks clarity on required input parameters, return structure, and explicit mention of revision creation as a state-changing side effect. Enhanced version specifies input options, return information, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of operation consequences.

message: Operation 'evaluateContent' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description relies on cross-reference to another operation, which is poor for AI agent interpretability. Lacks clarity on what 'content score' means and doesn't explicitly state the non-destructive nature. Enhanced version explains the operation independently, clarifies evaluation outputs, emphasizes no state changes occur, and explains the use case relative to /import-content.

data.current_description: Same as /import-content but does not save anything, just evaluates the content score. Input and output parameters are the same as /import-content.
data.description_suggestion: Evaluates content quality and SEO score for a query without persisting changes. Accepts same ImportContentRequest as /import-content (query ID and HTML or URL). Performs content analysis and scoring but does NOT create a revision or modify query state. Returns evaluation results including content score, recommendations, and analysis metrics. Useful for testing content changes before committing via /import-content.
data.reasoning: Original description relies on cross-reference to another operation, which is poor for AI agent interpretability. Lacks clarity on what 'content score' means and doesn't explicitly state the non-destructive nature. Enhanced version explains the operation independently, clarifies evaluation outputs, emphasizes no state changes occur, and explains the use case relative to /import-content.

data.current_description: Allows you to update the editor content via API for a given query. You can either import HTML or send a URL that will be auto-imported and parsed. Creates a new content revision.
data.summary_suggestion: Import and save content for query
data.description_suggestion: Imports and saves content for a specified query via HTML or URL. Accepts ImportContentRequest with either raw HTML content or a URL for automatic parsing and import. Useful for programmatically updating content based on SEO recommendations.
